category_sources: source_facts.description says Music Player Daemon; official homepage describes MPD as a server-side application for playing music.
display_name_sources: Official homepage heading expands MPD as Music Player Daemon; source_facts.description matches.
docs_sources: Official Music Player Daemon site links to stable documentation, protocol specification, and developer manual on mpd.readthedocs.io.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/MusicPlayerDaemon/MPD; per instruction repo is returned as null when already supplied.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes MPD as a flexible, powerful server-side music application controlled by its network protocol.
